Class MMOItemsStatIntegration

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.integration.MMOItemsStatIntegration
public class MMOItemsStatIntegration extends Object
Helper class for integrating reforge stats with MMOItems' native stat system. This ensures proper Hebrew translation, icons, and (+X) bonus display from language/stats.yml.

  • Constructor Details

    • MMOItemsStatIntegration

      public MMOItemsStatIntegration()

  • Method Details

    • isMMOItem

      public static boolean isMMOItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Checks if an ItemStack is an MMOItem by looking for MMOItems NBT tags.
      Parameters:
      item - The item to check
      Returns:
      true if this is an MMOItem, false otherwise

    • applyMMOItemStat

      public static org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack applyMMOItemStat(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, String statId, double value)
      Applies a stat bonus to an MMOItem using direct NBT manipulation. This avoids rebuilding the item from template, preserving all custom metadata like reforges, rarity lore, and custom names.
      Parameters:
      item - The MMOItem to modify
      statId - The stat identifier (e.g., "attack_damage")
      value - The stat value to add
      Returns:
      The modified ItemStack

    • removeReforgeStats

      public static org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack removeReforgeStats(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, Map<String,Double> reforgeStats)
      Removes reforge stat bonuses from an MMOItem using direct NBT.

    • getMMOItemType

      public static String getMMOItemType(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Gets the MMOItem type from an ItemStack.
      Parameters:
      item - The item to check
      Returns:
      The MMOItem type string, or null if not an MMOItem

    • getMMOItemID

      public static String getMMOItemID(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Gets the MMOItem ID from an ItemStack.
      Parameters:
      item - The item to check
      Returns:
      The MMOItem ID string, or null if not an MMOItem
